name: W8 Legs Morning Flow
description: 15 min. Same as W7. Hip warmup, pigeon + lizard, glute bridge + dead bug + plank hip dips. Back extensions are in the workout — hip flexor mobility matters.

exercises.notes: 3 seconds down, 2 in the hole, drive up.
Low lunge + twist. Hip flexors and thoracic.
45s each side. W8 — should be noticeably deeper than W6. Keep pushing range.
30s each side. Elbows down if possible.
Deep side lunge. Cossack squat carryover from KB days.
Squeeze at top. Activate before you load.
Core bracing — back extensions in today's workout need this.

tips: Back extensions are in the workout today — hip flexor mobility from pigeon/lizard matters.
Pigeon and lizard: 8 weeks in, range should be visibly better. Go deeper.
If short on time: hip warmup + pigeon + glute bridge. 8 min.
